## Dependabot dependency review checklist

- [ ] Version bump is understood (package + old/new version).
- [ ] Changelog/release notes reviewed.
- [ ] Security advisories reviewed (GHSA/OSV/npm audit).
- [ ] Breaking changes and migration notes reviewed.
- [ ] Risk score assessed and documented.
- [ ] Governance evidence attached (receipts/ledger references).

### Auernyx dependency analysis notes

- Capability output summary:
- Risk level:
- Auto-approve eligibility:
- Required follow-up checks:
